introSection: Sky Rocket II is a steel launched roller coaster planned to open on Steel Pier in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA. The final name has not yet been announced.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Sky Rocket II was announced on November 17, 2022 in Orlando, Florida, USA at the 2022 IAAPA Expo.

fullText:
Sky Rocket II is a steel launched roller coaster planned to open on Steel Pier in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA. The final name has not yet been announced.

Sky Rocket II was announced on November 17, 2022 in Orlando, Florida, USA at the 2022 IAAPA Expo.
